steps.title: Identify the species name
steps.content: The italicized name Doleschallia bisaltide immediately identifies which species the specimen belongs to. Because the name is essential identification, it should attach directly to the noun species.

steps.title: Keep the identifier attached
steps.content: Choice B incorrectly uses a semicolon before a name, Choice C uses an unnecessary colon, and Choice D treats the name as nonessential with a comma. A restrictive identifier should not be separated from the noun it identifies. The answer is A.
